screenshots.title: Start workspace
screenshots.desc: Add the first IEC 61850 IED, open a project, and start the gateway from one calm workspace.

screenshots.title: Live IEC 61850 values
screenshots.desc: Inspect discovered MMS values, quality flags, polling mode, logical nodes, and IEC object references.

screenshots.title: Modbus TCP map
screenshots.desc: Publish selected IEC 61850 signals as clean Modbus addresses for DCS, SCADA, and FUXA HMI.

screenshots.title: MQTT topics
screenshots.desc: Route the same selected signals to broker topics for web HMI, IoT dashboards, and learning labs.

notes: Static product page assets. ARServer itself runs as a Windows desktop gateway and requires user-supplied libiec61850-compatible DLLs for real IED communication plus an external MQTT broker for MQTT output.
